DE.Autobahn.RoadEvent.name: RoadEvent
DE.Autobahn.RoadEvent.description: Normalized Autobahn road-event payload used for roadworks and closure-like items. Source pages: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/roadworks and https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/closure.

StringList.name: StringList
StringList.description: Reusable array of strings for Autobahn list-valued text and symbol fields.

schema.name: RoadEvent

identifier.description: Stable Autobahn item identifier used for the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

road_ids.description: Autobahn road identifiers for the road query that yielded this item. The bridge emits the queried road id as a stable array field shared by all Autobahn families.

event_time.description: CloudEvents event time for the emitted record. For appeared events the bridge uses startTimestamp when the API supplies it; otherwise it uses the poll timestamp.

display_type.description: Autobahn API display_type value that identifies the road-event subtype.

title.description: Human-readable title from the Autobahn API item.

subtitle.description: Human-readable subtitle from the Autobahn API item.

description_lines.description: Description lines from the Autobahn API description array.

future.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the item as a future event.

is_blocked.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the affected road segment as blocked.

icon.description: Autobahn API icon identifier for the item.

start_lc_position.description: Numeric startLcPosition value emitted by the Autobahn API for the beginning of the affected segment.

start_timestamp.description: startTimestamp value from the Autobahn API when the item includes a scheduled or known start time.

extent.description: Autobahn API extent text for the affected road segment.

point.description: Autobahn API point text that identifies the affected point on the road segment.

coordinate_lat.description: Latitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

coordinate_lon.description: Longitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

geometry_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API geometry object for the affected road segment.

impact_lower.description: Lower bound from the Autobahn API impact object.

impact_upper.description: Upper bound from the Autobahn API impact object.

impact_symbols.description: Impact symbols from the Autobahn API impact.symbols array.

route_recommendation_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API routeRecommendation object when rerouting advice is available.

footer_lines.description: Footer lines from the Autobahn API footer array.

schema.description: Normalized Autobahn road-event payload used for roadworks and closure-like items. Source pages: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/roadworks and https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/closure.

DE.Autobahn.WarningEvent.name: WarningEvent
DE.Autobahn.WarningEvent.description: Normalized Autobahn warning payload with delay and traffic source details. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/warning.

StringList.name: StringList
StringList.description: Reusable array of strings for Autobahn list-valued text and symbol fields.

schema.name: WarningEvent

identifier.description: Stable Autobahn warning identifier used for the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

road_ids.description: Autobahn road identifiers for the road query that yielded this warning item.

event_time.description: CloudEvents event time for the emitted warning record. For appeared events the bridge uses startTimestamp when the API supplies it; otherwise it uses the poll timestamp.

display_type.description: Autobahn API display_type for warning items.

title.description: Human-readable title from the Autobahn API warning item.

subtitle.description: Human-readable subtitle from the Autobahn API warning item.

description_lines.description: Description lines from the Autobahn API description array.

future.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the warning as a future event.

is_blocked.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the warning segment as blocked.

icon.description: Autobahn API icon identifier for the warning item.

start_lc_position.description: Numeric startLcPosition value emitted by the Autobahn API for the beginning of the warning segment.

start_timestamp.description: startTimestamp value from the Autobahn API when the warning includes a scheduled or known start time.

extent.description: Autobahn API extent text for the affected road segment.

point.description: Autobahn API point text that identifies the affected point on the road segment.

coordinate_lat.description: Latitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

coordinate_lon.description: Longitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

geometry_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API geometry object for the affected road segment.

impact_lower.description: Lower bound from the Autobahn API impact object.

impact_upper.description: Upper bound from the Autobahn API impact object.

impact_symbols.description: Impact symbols from the Autobahn API impact.symbols array.

route_recommendation_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API routeRecommendation object when rerouting advice is available.

footer_lines.description: Footer lines from the Autobahn API footer array.

delay_minutes.description: delayTimeValue from the Autobahn warning item, expressed in minutes.

average_speed_kmh.description: averageSpeed from the Autobahn warning item, expressed in kilometers per hour.

abnormal_traffic_type.description: abnormalTrafficType code from the Autobahn warning item.

source_name.description: source value from the Autobahn warning item that identifies the origin of the warning.

schema.description: Normalized Autobahn warning payload with delay and traffic source details. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/warning.

DE.Autobahn.ParkingLorry.name: ParkingLorry
DE.Autobahn.ParkingLorry.description: Normalized Autobahn lorry parking payload with parsed amenity and space counts. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/parking_lorry.

StringList.name: StringList
StringList.description: Reusable array of strings for Autobahn list-valued text and symbol fields.

schema.name: ParkingLorry

identifier.description: Stable Autobahn parking identifier used for the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

road_ids.description: Autobahn road identifiers for the road query that yielded this parking item.

event_time.description: CloudEvents event time for the emitted parking record. The bridge uses the poll timestamp because parking items do not expose startTimestamp in the normalized payload.

display_type.description: Autobahn API display_type for lorry parking items.

title.description: Human-readable title from the Autobahn API parking item.

subtitle.description: Human-readable subtitle from the Autobahn API parking item.

description_lines.description: Description lines from the Autobahn API description array.

future.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the parking item as a future entry.

is_blocked.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the parking site as blocked.

icon.description: Autobahn API icon identifier for the parking item.

start_lc_position.description: Numeric startLcPosition value emitted by the Autobahn API for the parking site location.

extent.description: Autobahn API extent text for the parking site.

point.description: Autobahn API point text that identifies the parking site location.

coordinate_lat.description: Latitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

coordinate_lon.description: Longitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

route_recommendation_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API routeRecommendation object when rerouting advice is available for the parking location.

footer_lines.description: Footer lines from the Autobahn API footer array.

amenity_descriptions.description: Descriptions extracted from lorryParkingFeatureIcons[].description for the parking site amenities.

car_space_count.description: Number of passenger-car spaces parsed from description lines that contain PKW Stellplätze.

lorry_space_count.description: Number of lorry spaces parsed from description lines that contain LKW Stellplätze.

schema.description: Normalized Autobahn lorry parking payload with parsed amenity and space counts. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/parking_lorry.

DE.Autobahn.ChargingStation.name: ChargingStation
DE.Autobahn.ChargingStation.description: Normalized Autobahn charging-station payload with parsed address and charging point details. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/electric_charging_station.

StringList.name: StringList
StringList.description: Reusable array of strings for Autobahn list-valued text and symbol fields.

schema.name: ChargingStation

identifier.description: Stable Autobahn charging-station identifier used for the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

road_ids.description: Autobahn road identifiers for the road query that yielded this charging station item.

event_time.description: CloudEvents event time for the emitted charging-station record. The bridge uses the poll timestamp because charging station items do not expose startTimestamp in the normalized payload.

display_type.description: Autobahn API display_type for charging-station items.

title.description: Human-readable title from the Autobahn API charging-station item.

subtitle.description: Human-readable subtitle from the Autobahn API charging-station item.

description_lines.description: Description lines from the Autobahn API description array.

future.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the charging station item as a future entry.

is_blocked.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the charging station site as blocked.

icon.description: Autobahn API icon identifier for the charging station item.

extent.description: Autobahn API extent text for the charging station site.

point.description: Autobahn API point text that identifies the charging station site.

coordinate_lat.description: Latitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

coordinate_lon.description: Longitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

address_line.description: Address line parsed from the first Autobahn API description line for the charging station site.

charging_point_count.description: Number of parsed charging point entries derived from the Autobahn API description lines.

charging_points_json.description: Serialized array of normalized charging point entries parsed from the Autobahn API description lines.

route_recommendation_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API routeRecommendation object when rerouting advice is available for the charging station site.

footer_lines.description: Footer lines from the Autobahn API footer array.

schema.description: Normalized Autobahn charging-station payload with parsed address and charging point details. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/electric_charging_station.

DE.Autobahn.Webcam.name: Webcam
DE.Autobahn.Webcam.description: Normalized Autobahn webcam payload with operator and media URLs. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/webcam.

StringList.name: StringList
StringList.description: Reusable array of strings for Autobahn list-valued text and symbol fields.

schema.name: Webcam

identifier.description: Stable Autobahn webcam identifier used for the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

road_ids.description: Autobahn road identifiers for the road query that yielded this webcam item.

event_time.description: CloudEvents event time for the emitted webcam record. The bridge uses the poll timestamp because webcam items do not expose startTimestamp in the normalized payload.

display_type.description: Autobahn API display_type for webcam items.

title.description: Human-readable title from the Autobahn API webcam item.

subtitle.description: Human-readable subtitle from the Autobahn API webcam item.

description_lines.description: Description lines from the Autobahn API description array.

future.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the webcam item as a future entry.

is_blocked.description: Whether the Autobahn API marks the webcam location as blocked.

icon.description: Autobahn API icon identifier for the webcam item.

extent.description: Autobahn API extent text for the webcam location.

point.description: Autobahn API point text that identifies the webcam location.

coordinate_lat.description: Latitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

coordinate_lon.description: Longitude extracted from the Autobahn API coordinate object or coordinate GeoJSON point.

route_recommendation_json.description: Serialized Autobahn API routeRecommendation object when rerouting advice is available for the webcam location.

footer_lines.description: Footer lines from the Autobahn API footer array.

operator_name.description: operator value from the Autobahn API webcam item.

image_url.description: imageurl value from the Autobahn API webcam item for the still image.

stream_url.description: linkurl value from the Autobahn API webcam item for the linked stream or detail page.

schema.description: Normalized Autobahn webcam payload with operator and media URLs. Source page: https://verkehr.autobahn.de/o/autobahn/A1/services/webcam.
